race.comment: STROMBOLI DELIGHT (4) ran a strong race last time out over 1300m at this track, finishing third and beaten 2 lengths after being in the firing line on the corner. Looks well placed in this contest so expect another big run this time. SHE'S BRUTAL (7) finished fourth two runs back then did well last start but found a couple better over 1200m here, beaten only 1.75 lengths. Gets 2kg weight relief with the claim and is nicely placed to find winning ways. SHOT DOWN BY LOVE (8) was in contention on the turn and finished second last start at the first run back from a spell over 1400m at Chinchilla, beaten 0.9 lengths. Finds a tougher race but may earn some minor money. PUREZZA (2) worked home well last start so the longer trip should suit.
